data.title: Blockchain Data Indicates Possible WLFI-Related Address Selling B Tokens
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain data reveals that an address potentially linked to WLFI is currently selling B tokens. The transactions can be tracked on the blockchain explorer BscScan, providing transparency and insight into the movement of these tokens. This activity has drawn attention within the cryptocurrency community, as stakeholders monitor the implications of these sales on the market.

data.title: Binance Wins Partial Victory in $11.9B BSV Lawsuit
data.description:
The investors had accused Binance and other crypto exchanges of conspiring to delist BSV in 2019. They argued this move deprived them of potential profits. But the court ruled that investors in the BSV lawsuit could have taken steps to reduce their losses. This undermined claims for speculative damages based on BSV’s hypothetical price growth
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/binance-wins-partial-victory-in-11-9b-bsv-lawsuit/

data.title: Trump: It is recommended to impose a 50% tariff directly on the EU from June 1
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said on social media that the main purpose of the establishment of the European Union is to take advantage of the United States in trade, but the European Union is difficult to deal with. Their strong trade barriers, value-added taxes, ridiculous corporate penalties, non-monetary trade barriers, currency manipulation, unfair and unreasonable lawsuits against American companies, etc., have led to an annual trade deficit of more than 2500000000 US dollars in the United States, which is totally unacceptable. Our discussions with them have made no progress. Therefore, I suggest that a 50% tariff be imposed directly on the European Union from June 1, 2025. If the product is manufactured or produced in the United States, no tariff will be imposed. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance Discord Pizza Day Giveaway Offers USDC Rewards
data.description:
According to Binance's official announcement, the platform is celebrating Pizza Day with a unique giveaway on its Discord server, offering participants the chance to earn virtual pizzas and share in USDC token rewards. The activity is set to run from 2025-05-22 12:00 (UTC) to 2025-06-02 12:00 (UTC).

Participants can join the Binance Discord server and navigate to the #pizza-game channel to start collecting Discord coins. The process involves typing the command "/work" and waiting for one hour before using "/work claim" to redeem Discord coins. This cycle can be repeated until a user accumulates 5,000 Discord coins, at which point they can type "/buy" to claim their virtual pizza. Users can continue using the commands until the activity ends to rank on the Discord coins leaderboard. The "work claim" command rewards users with a random amount of Discord coins, ranging from 100 to 300. Additionally, users can stay alert for potential side quests on Binance Discord to collect extra coins.

Rewards for the activity include a shared pool of 2,500 USDC token vouchers for all eligible users who claim a virtual Binance Pizza. Furthermore, the top 10 users with the most Discord coins will equally split an additional 500 USDC token vouchers. To qualify for rewards, users must be among the top 100 most engaged participants on the Binance Discord server. Only users who have completed identity verification (KYC) will be eligible for rewards. Winners will be announced in the official #discord-news channel one day after the activity concludes, and rewards will be allocated within 28 working days. Users can redeem their token voucher rewards via the Profile > Rewards Hub, with a validity period of 30 days from distribution.

Binance emphasizes that it reserves the right to disqualify participants showing signs of fraudulent behavior or tampering with program code. The platform also retains the discretion to cancel rewards if terms and conditions are breached. Binance may amend or vary the terms and conditions of the activity without prior notice, including changes to eligibility criteria, selection and number of winners, and timing. Participants are advised to review the additional promotion terms and conditions available on the Binance website. The Binance team expresses gratitude for the community's support during this event.

data.title: Binance Alpha Revolutionizes Web3 Engagement with On-Chain Integration
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, highlighting the transformative impact of Binance Alpha on Web3 engagement. This platform integrates on-chain discovery and trading directly into the Binance Exchange, making it accessible to everyday users without the need for a separate wallet or dealing with gas fees. By offering early access to high-potential Web3 projects through exclusive token generation events (TGEs) and airdrops, Binance Alpha sets a new standard for user-first participation, promising significant reward potential.

On May 19, 2025, Binance Wallet recorded an impressive $5 billion in daily trading volume, capturing 95.3% of the share tracked across 12 major wallets, as reported by Dune Analytics. This surge was largely driven by Binance Alpha, an early-access discovery platform integrated into Binance Wallet and Exchange. It empowers users to engage with high-potential Web3 projects before they become widely available, allowing participants to benefit from exclusive TGEs and airdrops. The success of Alpha is not just a one-off spike but signifies a fundamental shift in how people engage with Web3.

For years, the complexity of engaging with on-chain tools has been a significant barrier to Web3 adoption. Binance Alpha addresses this challenge by bringing on-chain discovery and trading directly into the Binance Exchange, eliminating friction and opening up early-stage opportunities to a broader audience. Users can now trade on-chain without needing a wallet and execute transactions with ease, without worrying about gas or technical hurdles. This development empowers everyday users to explore and participate in Web3 with the confidence they are accustomed to in traditional trading.

The introduction of Alpha Points ensures fairer access to exclusive opportunities, rewarding active participation and driving a surge in user engagement and trading volume. Alpha Points are calculated on a rolling 15-day basis and determine eligibility for TGEs and airdrops. In May 2025, the system was enhanced with a consumption mechanism, turning Alpha Points from a passive score into an active access credential. This change led to a significant increase in participation, with the number of active traders on Binance Wallet surging more than 58% on April 25, 2025.

Binance Alpha is redefining how users discover early-stage projects and earn real rewards, setting a new standard for user-first participation in Web3. By removing traditional frictions of on-chain engagement and coupling early access with tangible rewards, Alpha makes the decentralized Web intuitive, accessible, and worthwhile for a global audience. As the program continues to scale, Binance remains committed to empowering users, elevating access, and making the future of finance easier to join.
